brain_stats: Synapse Brain currently has {nodes} nodes and {pending} pending updates.
processing_nodes: Processing {nodes} neural nodes across the global cluster.
gate_subtitle: Oversight portal for proposed knowledge updates.
no_proposals_subtitle: No pending proposals require oversight at this time.
agents_subtitle: The autonomous workforce powering the Synapse Intelligence OS.
settings_subtitle: Configure the Synapse Intelligence OS core parameters.
db_sync_status: PostgreSQL Database and Knowledge sync status.
graph_description: Interactive visualization of your brain's neural connections.
manage_tag_colors_desc: Manage colors and appearance for tags in the knowledge graph.
hero_subtitle: Advanced zero-cloud knowledge management solution. Integrates local PostgreSQL neural network and 12 specialized AI Agents to help your project detect risks, extract lessons & accelerate development.
pillars_subtitle: Architected on the Zero-Debt Architecture philosophy to deliver maximum performance.
pillar_1_desc: All lessons, project context, and entity relationships are automatically linked within the local PostgreSQL database. Ready for instant extraction using the Relevance Radius algorithm.
pillar_2_desc: AI entities operate independently with specialized personalities, tasks, and communication styles. Supports multi-dimensional roundtable discussions (Party Mode) to resolve complex decisions.
pillar_3_desc: Ensures knowledge integrity. Agents only propose data; the user holds supreme approval authority through an intuitive Diff View interface.
roster_subtitle: 12 AI agents representing core departments in the system development and operations process.
footer_crafted: Crafted with the Zero-Debt Architecture philosophy by Antigravity
evolution_subtitle: Review historical approvals, rejections, and knowledge mergers.
rem_mode_desc_enabled: REM mode is active. Similar knowledge will be consolidated and approved automatically during idle time.
rem_mode_desc_disabled: REM mode is disabled. You will manually approve all proposals at The Gate.
similarity_threshold_desc: Threshold to evaluate duplicate logic between proposals and existing knowledge.
confidence_threshold_desc: Minimum confidence score for proposals to be auto-approved.
forget_mode_desc_enabled: Memory decay is active. Lessons with high virtual age and low connection scores will transition to COLD storage during REM sleep.
forget_mode_desc_disabled: Memory decay is disabled. All active knowledge stays active permanently.
forget_dry_run_desc_enabled: Dry-run is active. Decay scores are analyzed in logs, but no nodes will actually transition to COLD storage.
forget_dry_run_desc_disabled: Dry-run is inactive. Decay transitions will be written directly to the database.
not_found_desc: The requested path does not exist or has been garbage-collected within the Synapse knowledge framework.
no_history_desc: Actions you approve or reject will be recorded in this personal developer logbook.
synthesize_subtitle: Synthesizing Node C from A & B
dep_graph_subtitle: Visualize dependency graph and analyze multi-language blast radius (Blast Radius).
no_dependents: This file is standalone; no other files are impacted.
click_node_instruction: Click a node on the graph to view exported symbols and analyze reverse impact.
no_data_indexed: No repository has been indexed yet.
